meta.title: Social Battery Test | Real-Time Energy Meter - DopaBrain
meta.description: Watch your social battery charge and drain in real time! Tap through 12 social scenarios to discover your energy type.

app.title: Social Battery
app.subtitle: Real-Time Energy Meter
app.heroTitle: Watch Your Battery React in Real Time
app.heroDesc: Tap through 12 social scenarios. Your battery charges or drains based on your choices — see it happen live!
app.disclaimer: For entertainment only. Not a clinical diagnosis.

s1.title: Surprise Party
s1.desc: Your friends throw you a surprise birthday party. 20 people yelling 'SURPRISE!' as you walk in.

s2.title: Networking Event
s2.desc: A professional mixer with 50+ strangers. Everyone's making small talk and exchanging business cards.

s3.title: Solo Lunch
s3.desc: Eating lunch alone at a quiet café with a good book. Nobody knows where you are.

s4.title: Group Video Call
s4.desc: A group video call with 8 friends that's been going on for over an hour.

s5.title: Crowded Festival
s5.desc: Walking through a packed music festival. Shoulder-to-shoulder crowds, loud music, sensory overload.

s6.title: Movie Night
s6.desc: A cozy movie night at home with 1-2 close friends. Blankets, snacks, no pressure to talk.

s7.title: Center of Attention
s7.desc: You're doing karaoke and everyone in the room is watching you sing. All eyes on you.

s8.title: Weekend Alone
s8.desc: An entire weekend with zero plans. Just you, your hobbies, and complete silence.

s9.title: Spontaneous Trip
s9.desc: Friends text: 'Road trip in 30 min, pack a bag!' A spontaneous weekend adventure with 4 friends.

s10.title: Unknown Caller
s10.desc: Your phone rings with an unknown number. It could be important... or it could be anyone.

s11.title: Busy Café Work
s11.desc: Working on your laptop at a packed, noisy café. People chatting all around you.

s12.title: Nature Hike
s12.desc: A quiet solo hike through a forest trail. Just birdsong, trees, and your own thoughts.

solarPanel.name: ☀️ Solar Panel
solarPanel.desc: You're a social powerhouse that charges up around people! Conversations and gatherings are your fuel — being alone actually drains you.
solarPanel.recharge: Lively conversations, parties, group activities, meeting new people

rechargeable.name: 🔋 Rechargeable Battery
rechargeable.desc: You strike the perfect balance between social and alone time! You manage your energy flexibly based on the situation.
rechargeable.recharge: Small gatherings, deep talks with close friends, café time, outdoor activities

energySaver.name: 🔌 Energy Saver
energySaver.desc: An efficient introvert who wisely manages their energy! You prefer deep connections with a few and truly recharge in solitude.
energySaver.recharge: Reading, solo walks, music, hobbies, quiet spaces

emergency.name: 🪫 Emergency Mode
emergency.desc: An ultra-sensitive energy detector! Social situations drain your battery fast, and meaningful alone time is absolutely essential.
emergency.recharge: Complete silence, nature walks, meditation, creative activities, digital detox

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants share your social battery level

share.twitterText: My social battery is at {percent}%! Type: {type} 🔋 What's yours?

about.text1: This test presents 12 social scenarios ranging from surprise parties to solo hikes. For each situation, you choose whether it charges or drains your energy. Your on-screen battery reacts in real time, giving you an instant visual of your social energy patterns.
about.text2: Social energy varies from person to person. Some people thrive in large groups while others prefer quiet solitude. Neither is better or worse -- understanding your social battery helps you plan your time, set boundaries, and avoid social burnout.
